ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the individual (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual (fnlwgt) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education completed */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "class" TEXT /* Income class of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the individual's data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the individual's data */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_collection_method FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Standardized level of education */,
  "equivalent_degree" TEXT /* Equivalent degree for international education levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., State-gov, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "work_class_level" INTEGER /* Standardized level of work class */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of work class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., Survey, Interview) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_set_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., Demographic, Socioeconomic) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sets_collection_method FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
